# CWE-319 — Cleartext Transmission of Sensitive Information (vulnerable) (pure stdlib)
lang: go
file: CWE-319-vulnerable.pure.go
variant: pure-go
---
package sample

import (
	"encoding/json"
	"net/http"
)

type cardPayload struct {
	Number string `json:"number"`
	CVV    string `json:"cvv"`
}

// Vulnerable: serves PAN/CVV over plain HTTP listener.
func StartPaymentsAPI() error {
	mux := http.NewServeMux()
	mux.HandleFunc("/pay", func(w http.ResponseWriter, r *http.Request) {
		var p cardPayload
		_ = json.NewDecoder(r.Body).Decode(&p)
		w.WriteHeader(http.StatusOK)
	})
	return http.ListenAndServe(":8080", mux)
}
